result.name: LIBERAL STUDIES,  B.A.
result.templateAssets:
[{"type":"GeneralTitle","content":"NEW ADMISSIONS CRITERIA","groupId":"8cd261a9-2539-430a-aee1-019a5a487e63","position":1,"area":"General"},{"type":"GeneralText","content":"

While major courses are not required for admission, it is highly recommended that students complete as many recommended major preparatory courses as possible before transferring to support timely progress to degree. Any major courses not completed prior to enrollment at UC Merced must be taken after transfer to stay on track for graduation. To identify which courses may transfer, students should use the Department or Prefix search in ASSIST and look up articulated courses under the relevant subject areas (for example, WRI, HIST, PHIL, etc.).


Cornerstone Requirement (Coming Soon)

-LBST 001

Social Sciences – Complete 8 units in the following subjects: ANTH; COGS; CRS; ECON; GEOG; HS; MGMT; PH; POLI; PSY

Approved courses:

-ANTH 001, 003, 005, 010, 033

-COGS 001, 005, 013

-CRS 010

-ECON 001, 001H, 005, 006A, 006B, 007, 010, 050

-GEOG 002, 010

-HS 001, 002, 003, 004, 010

-MGMT (no applicable lower-division courses)

-PH 001, 005, 010

-POLI 001, 002, 003, 005, 006, 009, 010

-PSY 001, 010, 015


Humanities & Arts – Complete 8 units in the following subjects: CCST; CHN; CRES; EH; ENG; FRE; GASP; HIST; JPN; PHIL; SPAN; WRI

Approved courses:

-CCST 014, 060

-CHN 001, 002, 003, 004

-CRES 001, 011, 012, 020, 022, 027, 030, 039, 040, 043, 051, 052, 059A, 070, 072B, 076A, 076B

-EH 001, 019, 059, 060, 067

-ENG 001, 010, 011, 012, 018, 019, 020, 022, 030, 031, 032, 033, 034, 049, 050, 051, 052, 054, 055, 056, 057, 058, 059, 060, 061, 062, 063, 064, 065, 066, 067, 071, 089

-FRE 001, 002, 003, 004

-GASP 001, 002, 003, 004, 006, 007, 010, 011, 012A, 013A, 014, 015A, 020, 026A, 030A, 030B, 030C, 030D, 030E, 031A, 031B, 031C, 031D, 034A, 034B, 034C, 036A, 036B, 041A, 055A, 055B, 055C, 055D, 056, 057, 059, 059A, 060, 060A, 064A, 064B, 065A, 066A, 069A, 070A, 070B, 070C, 072A, 072B, 075A, 076B, 079A, 079B, 080A, 080B, 089A

-HIST 005, 008, 010, 011, 012, 016, 017, 020, 021, 022, 027, 030, 030B, 035, 039, 040, 041, 042, 043, 051, 052, 055, 055A, 055D, 060, 070, 071

-JPN 001, 002, 003, 004

-PHIL 001, 002, 003, 004, 005, 006, 008, 009

-SPAN 001, 002, 003, 004, 010, 011, 014, 050, 060

-WRI 001, 001A, 010, 010H, 011, 022, 025, 030

 

Additional Social Sciences or Humanities & Arts – Complete 4 units

-Choose any approved course from the Social Sciences or Humanities & Arts subject lists above.

*Up to 4 units of lower division STEM coursework can substitute, with a petition process.


AP Exam Score & Course Exemptions

-An AP Statistics score of 4 exempts BIO 018 or PSY 010

-An AP Statistics score of 5 exempts ECON 010 or SOC 010

-An AP Psychology score of 4 or 5 exempts PSY 001

-AP History: US History: score of 4 or 5 exempts HIST 016 and HIST 017

-AP History: World History: Modern: score of 4 or 5 exempts HIST 010 or HIST 011

Visit the UC Merced Advance Placement (AP) and International Baccalaureate (IB) page to view additional AP credit scores and credit policies in the link below:

Advance Placement (AP) and International Baccalaureate (IB) Examinations



Please note: Liberal Studies and each emphasis track have different requirements; please review the information for each area to ensure completion of the appropriate preparatory coursework. This major is currently under development, and finalized information will be published in the 2026–2027 catalog.


For questions about admissions, please email: transfer@ucmerced.edu.

","groupId":"27201343-6715-4da2-93f0-019a5a487e63","position":4,"area":"General"},{"type":"GeneralText","content":"

Liberal Studies is designed to allow students transferring as juniors and enrolled full-time to complete all degree requirements within two years. This interdisciplinary major brings together the social sciences, humanities, and arts, with the option to pursue an emphasis area and tailor a flexible program of study. Students develop strong skills in critical thinking, problem-solving, and communication, preparing them for a wide range of career paths and graduate study opportunities.

","groupId":"a94d7150-2e2c-40b5-862f-019a7f29ad69","position":0,"area":"General"},{"type":"GeneralText","content":"

The General Transfer Requirements are as follows:


Units and GPA

-Complete 60 semester (90 quarter) units of UC-transferable college credit

-Earn a minimum grade point average of 2.40 (nonresident: 2.80) in UC-transferable courses

Take no more than 14 semester (21 quarter) units as Pass/Not Pass


Course Requirements/Subject Requirements

-Complete the following seven-course pattern, earning a grade of C- or better in each course:

-Two transferable English composition courses

-One transferable mathematical concepts and quantitative reasoning course that has a published prerequisite of intermediate algebra

-Four transferable courses chosen from at least two of the following areas: Arts and Humanities, Behavioral and Social Sciences, Biological and Physical Sciences


**Other than the UC Merced requirements, applicants do not have to fulfill any additional requirements. The TAG Requirements below differ from Transfer Selection**

NEW TAG Approved: Transfer Admissions Guarantee (TAG): Liberal Studies will participate in the Transfer Admissions Guarantee program.

For students entering through TAG, the following requirements apply:

-GPA: Minimum transferable unit GPA of 2.8, or higher

-Course Requirements: One UC transferable course in Social Sciences and one UC transferable course in Humanities and Arts


Transfer Admissions Guarantee (TAG): UC Merced is one of the six UC's that offers Transfer Admissions Guarantee: Please visit the TAG website for more information: https://admissions.ucmerced.edu/transfer/tag
